name: LIPOID PNEUMONIA

demographics.Path: pool of oil emulsified by lung lipase + surrounded by giant cell foreign body reaction
demographics.Histo: numerous lipid-laden macrophages distending alveolar walls + interstitium,

dominant_finding: return to ground-glass opacity ← expectoration + lymphatic drainage of lipid droplets +
discriminating_features: ill-defined nodular areas of increased radiopacity
paraffinoma = circumscribed peripheral mass (granulomatous reaction + fibrosis often

general: ill-defined nodular areas of increased radiopacity
paraffinoma = circumscribed peripheral mass (granulomatous reaction + fibrosis often
CT: diffuse ground-glass opacity of centri- / panlobular distribution (= acinar pattern) +
airspace consolidation (filling of alveoli with exudate + inflammatory cells) at 1 week
return to ground-glass opacity ← expectoration + lymphatic drainage of lipid droplets +
volume loss + fibrosis of interlobular septa and pleura at 14-16 weeks
mass of low-attenuation approaching that of subcutaneous fat (-150 to 50 HU)
